product_overview: A FastAPI-based URL shortener service providing creation of short links (auto or custom aliases), HTTP redirect with click analytics, QR code generation, expiration and soft-delete semantics, and IP-based rate limiting.
core_goals: Allow users to create short, shareable URLs with optional custom aliases and expiration.
Perform fast HTTP 307 redirects while recording click analytics (IP, user-agent, browser, OS, referrer).
Provide aggregated and raw click analytics with pagination and optional date-range filtering.
Support QR code generation for short URLs, with configurable size.
Enforce IP-based rate limiting to mitigate abuse and provide soft-delete (deactivation) of URLs while keeping metadata.
Validate inputs strictly (URL format, alias format/reserved words, future expiration dates) and surface appropriate HTTP error codes.

features.name: URL Management API
features.description: Create, list, retrieve, update, and soft-delete shortened URLs; supports autogenerated short codes or validated custom aliases and optional expiration.
user_flows: POST /api/urls with body {"original_url":"https://example.com/long","custom_alias":"my-link","expires_at":"2026-12-31T23:59:59Z"} -> Receive 201 with JSON including short_code "my-link" and short_url -> GET /api/urls/my-link -> Receive 200 with URLResponse (is_active: true, click_count: 0) -> GET /api/urls?skip=0&limit=20 -> Receive 200 with list including the created URL -> PATCH /api/urls/my-link with body {"original_url":"https://example.com/new"} -> Receive 200 with updated URLResponse -> DELETE /api/urls/my-link -> Receive 204 No Content -> GET /api/urls/my-link -> Receive 200 with URLResponse (is_active: false)
POST /api/urls with body {"original_url":"not-a-valid-url"} -> Receive 400 Validation error (invalid URL)
POST /api/urls with body {"original_url":"https://example.com","custom_alias":"reserved_or_taken"} -> Receive 409 Conflict (custom alias already in use)

features.name: URL Redirect and Click Tracking
features.description: Redirect short codes to their original URL with HTTP 307 and record a ClickEvent capturing IP, user-agent, parsed browser/OS, referrer and timestamp; expired or deactivated URLs return 410.
user_flows: GET /{short_code} (where short_code is active) -> Receive 307 Temporary Redirect with Location header set to the original_url (server records a ClickEvent and increments click_count atomically) -> GET /api/urls/{short_code}/analytics -> Receive 200 with aggregated summary showing total_clicks increased

features.name: Analytics API
features.description: Provide aggregated analytics summary and paginated raw click events for a given short code; supports optional start_date/end_date filters for summaries.
user_flows: GET /api/urls/{short_code}/analytics?start_date=2026-03-01&end_date=2026-03-10 -> Receive 200 with aggregated summary (short_code, total_clicks, unique_visitors, browsers, operating_systems, referrers, clicks_by_date)
GET /api/urls/{short_code}/clicks?skip=0&limit=20 -> Receive 200 with ClickEventResponse[] (paginated raw click events)
GET /api/urls/{short_code}/analytics?start_date=invalid-date -> Receive 400 Validation error (invalid date format)

features.name: QR Code Generation
features.description: Generate and return a PNG QR code for a short URL with configurable size (box size 1-40); response is image/png bytes.
user_flows: GET /api/urls/{short_code}/qr?size=10 -> Receive 200 with Content-Type: image/png and PNG image bytes (valid PNG magic bytes)
GET /api/urls/{short_code}/qr?size=100 -> Receive 400 Validation error (size out of allowed 1-40 range)

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Lightweight health and utility endpoints to verify application availability and suppress browser favicon 404s.
user_flows: POST /api/urls repeatedly until rate limit exceeded -> Receive 429 Too Many Requests -> GET /health -> Receive 200 with JSON {"status":"healthy"} (health always responds regardless of rate limiting)

features.name: Rate Limiting
features.description: IP-based rate limiting applied across endpoints via slowapi; different endpoints have different limits (example: POST /api/urls 30/min, GET redirects 120/min).
user_flows: POST /api/urls with valid body (within rate limit) -> Receive 201 Created
POST /api/urls repeated beyond configured limit (e.g., 31st request for a 30/min limit) -> Receive 429 Too Many Requests

features.name: URL Management API
features.description: CRUD operations for shortened URLs with custom aliases, expiration, and soft-delete

endpoints.description: Create a new shortened URL with optional custom alias and expiration

body.expires_at: string (optional, ISO 8601 datetime, must be future date)

response_schema.400: Validation error (invalid URL, reserved alias, alias too short/long)

endpoints.description: Get URL metadata by short code
Soft-delete URL by setting is_active to false

features.name: URL Redirect and Click Tracking
features.description: Redirects short URLs to original URLs and records click analytics (IP, user-agent, browser, OS, referrer)

endpoints.description: Redirect to original URL and record click event

features.name: Analytics API
features.description: Aggregated analytics summaries and raw click event data for shortened URLs

endpoints.description: Get aggregated analytics summary with optional date range filtering
List raw click events with pagination

features.name: QR Code Generation
features.description: Generate QR code PNG images for shortened URLs

endpoints.description: Generate and return QR code PNG for the short URL

features.name: Rate Limiting
features.description: IP-based rate limiting on all API endpoints using slowapi

known_limitations.issue: No authentication or authorization - all endpoints publicly accessible
known_limitations.impact: Any client can manage any URL and view analytics

known_limitations.issue: Analytics aggregation loads all click records into memory
known_limitations.impact: High memory usage for URLs with millions of clicks

known_limitations.issue: SQLite not suitable for high concurrency production workloads
Country field never populated - no IP geolocation service

known_limitations.impact: Potential XSS payloads in analytics data
